mapper.select: SELECT * FROM sal_order_detail WHERE order_id = #{orderId} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY line_no

SELECT d.price FROM sal_order_detail d JOIN sal_order b ON b.id = d.order_id WHERE b.customer_id = #{customerId} AND d.product_id = #{productId} AND b.deleted = 0 AND d.deleted = 0 ORDER BY b.bill_date DESC LIMIT 1
